recommendations.title: Homicide
recommendations.overview: While investigating the ruthless murder of an elderly woman, a Jewish police detective unravels a bizarre conspiracy involving a Zionist organization.

recommendations.title: House of Games
recommendations.overview: A psychiatrist comes to the aid of a compulsive gambler and is led by a smooth-talking grifter into the shadowy but compelling world of stings, scams, and con men.

recommendations.title: State and Main
recommendations.overview: The residents of a small Vermont town don't know what hit them when a beleaguered Hollywood film crew brings a chaotic shoot to their quaint village.

recommendations.title: Spartan

recommendations.title: Phil Spector
recommendations.genres: Drama, TV Movie, Crime, History, Music
recommendations.overview: A drama centered on the relationship between Phil Spector and defense attorney Linda Kenney Baden while the music business legend was on trial for the murder of Lana Clarkson.

recommendations.title: Redbelt

recommendations.title: Heist
recommendations.overview: Joe Moore has a job he loves. He's a thief. His job goes sour when he gets caught on security camera tape. His fence, Bergman, reneges on the money he's owed, and his wife may be betraying him with the fence's young lieutenant. Moore and his partner,

recommendations.title: Mystic River
recommendations.overview: The lives of three men who were childhood friends are shattered when one of them suffers a family tragedy.

recommendations.title: Victoria
recommendations.overview: A young Spanish woman who has newly moved to Berlin finds her flirtation with a local guy turn potentially deadly as their night out with his friends reveals a dangerous secret.

recommendations.title: Shirley
recommendations.overview: A famous horror writer finds inspiration for her next book after she and her husband take in a young couple.
